abstract: No substantive abstract for this specific article was provided. The available text describes the Journal of Communication Technology (JoCTEC) as the official journal of the Communication Technology division of the Association for Education in Journalism and Mass Communication (AEJMC), and notes that the current site has superseded an older URL (joctec.org).
framing: The item is situated within the field of communication technology research as published by the AEJMC Communication Technology division, but no article-specific framing is available from the source text.
